base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fds_lost_levels_world_map_b — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. FDS Lost Levels second world-map entry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: FDS Lost Levels second world-map entry; structure similar to retail SMB with harder enemy placement.
